summary: Business Panel UI and Attraction Detail Page testing complete - All frontend tests passed (100%). Two new features tested: 1) Business Panel at /business with login for business users, 5-tab dashboard (Profil, Ponude, Meni, Poruke, Stats), and full CRUD capabilities. 2) Attraction detail page at /attraction/{id} with map, name, description, category badge, and location info. Storefront button visible on main map controls.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Frontend: Storefront button (testID='biz-panel-btn') visible on main map controls (orange button with storefront icon)
✓ Frontend: Clicking storefront button navigates to /business login page
✓ Frontend: Business login page has email input (testID='biz-email'), password input (testID='biz-password'), login button (testID='biz-login-btn'), back button (testID='back-biz-btn')
✓ Frontend: Login with starigrad@test.ba / Test1234! works correctly
✓ Frontend: After login, dashboard loads (testID='biz-dashboard') showing business name 'Restoran Stari Grad' and email
✓ Frontend: Dashboard has 5 tabs - Profil (testID='biz-tab-profil'), Ponude (testID='biz-tab-ponude'), Meni (testID='biz-tab-meni'), Poruke (testID='biz-tab-poruke'), Stats (testID='biz-tab-stats')
✓ Frontend: Profil tab (default active) shows location info (description, phone, working hours, address) with 'Uredi profil' button (testID='edit-profile-btn')
✓ Frontend: Ponude tab shows 'Nova ponuda / Novo u ponudi' button (testID='add-biz-offer-btn') and existing offers with discount badges (-20%, -15%)
✓ Frontend: Meni tab shows 'Nova stavka menija' button (testID='add-biz-menu-btn')
✓ Frontend: Poruke tab shows customer messages with sender name, date, message text, and 'Odgovori' button
✓ Frontend: Stats tab shows 3 stat boxes - Pregledi (16 views), Navigacija (3 nav clicks), Pozivi (3 call clicks) with icons
✓ Frontend: Attractions section visible on homepage with horizontal scroll of attraction cards
✓ Frontend: Clicking attraction card (testID='attraction-{id}') navigates to /attraction/{id} detail page
✓ Frontend: Attraction detail page (testID='attraction-detail') shows map at top with marker
✓ Frontend: Attraction detail shows category badge with icon and text (e.g., 'Kultura' with book icon)
✓ Frontend: Attraction detail shows name (testID='attraction-name'), description (testID='attraction-desc')
✓ Frontend: Attraction detail shows 'Lokacija' section with address 'Gradačac, Bosna i Hercegovina' and coordinates
✓ Frontend: Back button (testID='back-attraction-btn') on attraction detail returns to homepage
✓ Code quality: All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ Code quality: React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView)
✓ Code quality: Mobile-first design with proper spacing and touch targets
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing business account (starigrad@test.ba) and attraction data from database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features fully functional: 1) Business Panel UI at /business - business users can log in (starigrad@test.ba / Test1234!), view 5-tab dashboard (Profil, Ponude, Meni, Poruke, Stats), edit profile, manage offers/menu items, view messages, and see analytics. Storefront button visible on main map controls. 2) Attraction detail page at /attraction/{id} - clicking attraction on homepage opens detail page with map, name, description, category badge, and location info. Back button returns to homepage. All previous features verified working (map, search, categories, offers, events, leaderboard).
